title: Openapi Generation
description: SpecD Studio capability **Openapi Generation** (`api:openapi-generation`). Generate a machine-readable OpenAPI 3.1 document from route and DTO schemas. This spec is canonical after archive: implementers rely on the requirements below, not change-only documents.
context: SpecD Studio capability **Openapi Generation** (`api:openapi-generation`). Generate a machine-readable OpenAPI 3.1 document from route and DTO schemas. This spec is canonical after archive: implementers rely on the requirements below, not change-only documents.

rules.requirement: OpenAPI is generated from Fastify route schemas
rules:
The OpenAPI document MUST be generated from the Fastify route `schema` declarations (params/query/body/response) and shared DTO schemas, using `@fastify/swagger` (or an equivalent OpenAPI generator).

The implementation MUST NOT maintain a hand-written OpenAPI document (paths/schemas) in parallel to the route/DTO definitions.
The generated document MUST describe the `/v1` surface only.

constraints: HTTP handlers MUST NOT import @specd/core from @specd/ui or @specd/client.
v1 server auth: api.auth.type from specd.yaml (never studio.*); registry registers only disabled; no server-side Bearer enforcement on loopback or specd ui serve.
Artifact save/load MUST use core:save-change-artifact and core:get-change-artifact — not raw ChangeRepository.saveArtifact from HTTP handlers.
There is no GET /changes/{name}/validation resource; use GET .../status and POST .../validate.
Canonical workspace spec artifacts are read-only in Studio v1.

scenarios.requirement: OpenAPI is generated from Fastify route schemas
scenarios.name: Each routes spec path appears in OpenAPI
when: OpenAPI is generated from the mounted Fastify routes
then: AND request/response schemas reference DTO specs

scenarios.requirement: OpenAPI is generated from Fastify route schemas
scenarios.name: DTO changes update component schemas

scenarios.requirement: OpenAPI is generated from Fastify route schemas
scenarios.name: Undocumented handler routes are absent
when: generated OpenAPI is compared to the mounted router
then: AND no orphan paths only in code

scenarios.name: Info version matches /v1 contract
then: version bumps when breaking /v1 change ships
AND patch releases documented in changelog

scenarios.name: Servers entry uses configured base URL
Breaking rename requires version bump
then: OpenAPI version increments or CI fails
AND clients know to regenerate types
